identity: Shrewd human male tactician, clean-shaven, short slicked-back dark-brown hair, sharp calculating grey eyes, fair skin, lean build.
outfit: Formal military officer's long-coat in navy-blue with gold epaulets and gold buttons, a crimson sash, cream high-collar shirt with cravat beneath, dark trousers, polished knee-high boots. A leather satchel with rolled maps at the hip. A brass spyglass clipped to the belt.
weapons: A thin riding crop held in the right hand, used as a pointer. A saber at the left hip, not drawn.
attackStyle: East-facing. Riding crop slashed forward, left hand gesturing commandingly. Coat tails flare.
spellStyle: East-facing. Riding crop held low, free hand raised with a small glowing map-hologram of cyan-white light hovering above the palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Arm raised up with riding crop crossways to block, cravat visible. Squared stance.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen on one knee with head bowed, coat tails splayed, spyglass on the ground beside him.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), commanding idle. Riding crop tucked under the left arm, right hand in a gesturing point.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Slicked-back hair, navy officer's coat with gold epaulets and crimson sash, cravat visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Shrewd human male tactician, clean-shaven, short slicked-back dark-brown hair, sharp calculating grey eyes, fair skin, lean build.

OUTFIT: Formal military officer's long-coat in navy-blue with gold epaulets and gold buttons, a crimson sash, cream high-collar shirt with cravat beneath, dark trousers, polished knee-high boots. A leather satchel with rolled maps at the hip. A brass spyglass clipped to the belt.

WEAPONS: A thin riding crop held in the right hand, used as a pointer. A saber at the left hip, not drawn.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Shrewd human male tactician, clean-shaven, short slicked-back dark-brown hair, sharp calculating grey eyes, fair skin, lean build.

OUTFIT: Formal military officer's long-coat in navy-blue with gold epaulets and gold buttons, a crimson sash, cream high-collar shirt with cravat beneath, dark trousers, polished knee-high boots. A leather satchel with rolled maps at the hip. A brass spyglass clipped to the belt.

WEAPONS: A thin riding crop held in the right hand, used as a pointer. A saber at the left hip, not drawn.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Slicked-back hair, navy officer's coat with gold epaulets and crimson sash, cravat visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
